title: Rolson 62805 3 pc Utility Snap-Off Blade Knife Set
features: Blade lock and easy to change mechanism
description: From the manufacturer About Us Rolson Tools continually look to bring you new innovative products, all at the very best possible margins and this year is no different. To date, we have over 250 new exciting and innovative products to whet your appetite, together with a host of new in-store packaging and point-of-sale material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal!. The Rolson marketing team have sought innovative ways to package our new and existing lines. We bring promotional product combinations that offer originality and a unique sales offering. Description Rolson offers a wide range of tools that are suitable from everyday use by the DIY enthusiast to on-the-job professionals. Our seal of approval allows you to feel confident that your chosen product has been manufactured to international standards, which comes well presented in the unique Rolson branded packaging. Rolson are constantly aiming to increase and improve their catalogue by introducing the most exciting, innovative and reliable products possible without compromising on their values of quality and safety. Box Contains 1 x 3pc Utility Knife Set
